title: Delhi High Court rejects BlackBerry patent claim on colour-coded messaging
description: The Delhi High Court on Thursday rejected BlackBerry Limited’s patent claim over a colour-coded messaging feature, holding that the invention is not patentable under Indian law [BlackBerry Limited Vs Controller of Patents].Justice Tejas Karia dismissed BlackBerry’s appeal against the Controller of Patents and Designs' rejection of its 2008 patent application.Justice Tejas KariaThe patent application related to a method of assigning colours to/ colour coding message recipients on handheld mobile
